Internal Legal Memo — Project Ambar (Confidential, for Board/Compliance circulation within PT Halon Nexus Tbk.)
We propose acquiring 60% of PT Sinar Dompet Kripto (SDK), a fintech wallet and aset kripto gateway, with BI e-money license in process and Bappebti registration pending; this constitutes information material dan belum dipublikasikan under OJK rules.
Preliminary cyber update: SDK reported a contained credential-stuffing incident on 28 Mei involving test-wallet environments and hashed contact fields; no production fund movements detected, but treat related logs as Data Pribadi per UU PDP.
Headline commercial terms (indicative): purchase price IDR 280–330 miliar, 24‑month earn‑out tied to monthly active wallets and ESG uptime targets (renewable-powered data centers at ≥70%), and a 12‑month non-compete with key founders.
Information barriers: Maintain Chinese wall for “Ambar Room”; only authorized deal team may access; external advisors bound by NDA; no selective disclosure to vendors or beta partners.
Daftar Orang Dalam (insider list) must be opened today to include Ibu Mira Santoso (CFO), Bpk. Dewa Prasetyo (Head of Strategy), and two SDK founders; Compliance to maintain timestamps and confirmations.
Periode tertutup applies to directors, Komite Audit, Treasury, and any staff on the insider list for PT Halon Nexus Tbk. shares on IDX from today until public disclosure; do not trade, tip, or discuss with non-wall-crossed parties.
Subtle risk: sustainability-linked loan diligence by Green Mahoni Capital requires access to SDK uptime/energy metrics—route via the wall-crossed channel only to avoid inadvertent signaling of ESG-linked performance.
Employment note: the draft offer for a CTO candidate at SDK includes a token-based retention bonus aligned to the DLT roadmap; treat this as MNPI and refrain from broad HR circulation pending approval.
OJK keterbukaan: target announcement upon SPA signing or earlier if market rumor emerges; consider penundaan keterbukaan only if strict confidentiality holds and no misleading market condition arises.
UU PDP compliance actions: establish dasar pemrosesan, run a DPIA for incident logs, minimize personal data in the data room, and pseudonymize customer metrics before sharing with lenders.
This month’s ESG newsletter and crypto operations handbook are training materials only; references to cyber hygiene, insider lists, and blackout windows therein are educational and not transaction-related.
Next steps: finalize SPA long form by 12 Juni, confirm incident remediation letter from SDK by 7 Juni, and complete wall-cross confirmations for external counsel and lender by 5 Juni.
Questions or confirmations to compliance@halonnexus.co.id and legal.ops@halonnexus.co.id; primary contact: Corporate Secretary, Ms. R. Putri Karim (internal ext. 6721).
